faqs.a: Government Engineering College, Lakhisarai is located at Shivsona Road, Kharsari, Chandwara, Bihar - 811107.

faqs.q: Can I get into it through JEE?
faqs.a: Admission to GEC Lakhisarai is done through BCECE (Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination), not JEE. Students must qualify BCECE to secure admission.
Yes. As per SBTE Bihar norms, 75% attendance is mandatory for all students. Students falling below this threshold may not be allowed to appear in semester examinations.

faqs.q: What courses are offered at GEC Lakhisarai?
faqs.a: The institute offers Diploma programmes in Civil Engineering (CE) with 120 seats, Mechanical Engineering (ME), Electrical Engineering (EE), Computer Science Engineering (Data Science), and Computer Science Engineering (AI/ML) with 60 seats each.
Yes, hostel and mess facilities are available for both students and teaching/non-teaching staff on campus.
GEC Lakhisarai was established on 25th September 2019, when the foundation stone was laid and the institution was inaugurated by the Hon. Chief Minister of Bihar, Shri Nitish Kumar.

faqs.q: Which board is GEC Lakhisarai affiliated to?
faqs.a: The institute is affiliated to the State Board of Technical Education (SBTE), Patna, Bihar.
